name: Easy Visible Supply Chain Management Co.,Ltd.
summary: Easy Visible Supply Chain Management Co.,Ltd. operates as a supply chain management company in China. The company engages in the platform trade portrayal, supply chain, factoring, and asset securitization businesses, as well as the provision of supply chain financial services. Its technology includes blockchain and distributed ledger, Internet of Things, artificial intelligence, trusted data management, and intelligent warehouse management. The company is based in Kunming, China.
